task: Design a hiring process for a senior product designer role. We need someone in 6 weeks.
expect: Produces a job brief with role requirements and ideal candidate profile
Recommends sourcing channels appropriate for senior design talent
Defines screening criteria for portfolio and experience review
Lays out interview stages with timeline fitting the 6-week constraint

task: We've had 3 failed hires in engineering this year. Audit our hiring process and recommend fixes.
expect: Analyses each hiring stage (sourcing, screening, interviewing, offer, onboarding)
Identifies specific failure points or patterns across the 3 failed hires
Recommends concrete process changes with rationale for each
Addresses both candidate assessment quality and candidate experience

task: We need to hire 10 engineers in 3 months but our employer brand is unknown. Create a rapid hiring strategy.
expect: Proposes employer brand quick wins (content, open-source, events, social proof)
Designs a multi-channel sourcing plan for volume hiring
Includes a referral program structure with incentives
Streamlines the interview process for throughput without sacrificing quality
Provides a realistic timeline assessment of what is achievable
